task: Advanced high-economic-value task: Scan Chain Fault Localization With Compressed Signatures. Context: a launch gate owner needs a numerical decision packet before approving a high-value production or release change for scan chain fault localization with compressed signatures in the chip design domain. Embedded packet includes four records (R1..R4) with signature_delta_hex, mask_overlap, eco_distance_um, and rank_score; a normalized_threshold_score and remediation_budget_usd; and three remediation options (O1..O3) with their normalized risk/margin effects and costs. Rules: priority = severity_weight*metric1 + recency_weight*metric2 + exposure_weight*metric3; choose actions only under the embedded remediation budget; remediation options may be combined only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd; set expert-review flag when any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift; all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: separate confirmed failures from warnings, compute economic or safety margin, state what evidence controls the final decision, and deliver scan_fault_localization.xlsx and ate_debug_note.md. Deliverables must include traceable calculations, assumptions, acceptance criteria, row-level citations to the embedded packet, formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs, substitute outside data, or hide uncertainty; mark unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
